name: vibe-investing
description: Vibe Investing — 3개 퀀트 전략(ARDS, AMQS, MU_Hynix) 통합 대시보드

scripts.build:frontend: mkdir -p frontend/dist && cp -r frontend/public/. frontend/dist/ && esbuild frontend/src/main.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=frontend/dist/main.js
scripts.dev: npm run build:frontend && wrangler pages dev
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:frontend && wrangler pages deploy
